name: Cursor Agent
description: Invoke the local Cursor Agent CLI for deep code analysis, troubleshooting, and diagnostics. Supports loading project .cursor/rules, AGENTS.md, and MCP servers.

agentPath.description: Full path to the agent command. Leave empty for auto-detection

noOutputTimeoutSec.description: No-output timeout in seconds; process is considered hung if no output for this duration, default 120

model.description: Model for Cursor Agent to use, e.g. claude-4-sonnet. Leave empty for default

enableMcp.description: Whether to enable MCP servers (--approve-mcps), default true

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum concurrent Cursor CLI processes, default 3

enableAgentTool.description: Whether to register Agent Tool for PI Agent auto-invocation (fallback mechanism), default true

agentPath.label: Agent CLI Path
agentPath.help: Full path to Cursor Agent CLI. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH

projects.label: Project Mapping
projects.help: Project name to local path mapping

enableAgentTool.label: Enable Agent Tool
enableAgentTool.help: Register cursor_agent tool for PI Agent auto-invocation in conversations. Must be enabled in tools.allow
